pi_items.source: setup_task.sh injects this exact Drawing No into /home/ga/Desktop/flange_specification.txt
setup_task.sh injects Tolerance: ±0.5 mm into the specification sheet and verifier.py checks with this tolerance
setup_task.sh injects Flange base width (A to B): 120 mm into the specification sheet
setup_task.sh injects Flange base height (thickness): 12 mm into the specification sheet
setup_task.sh injects Hub width (G to D): 36 mm into the specification sheet
setup_task.sh injects Hub height (D to E): 60 mm into the specification sheet
setup_task.sh injects Left offset (A to G): 42 mm into the specification sheet
export_result.sh checks for this specific path as the SLVS output
export_result.sh checks for this specific path as the DXF output

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated 2D drawing (.slvs file) created via a python script in setup_task.sh. The setup script also drops a text specification document explicitly dictating the required corrections: Drawing No PSF-2247-REV-C, base width 120.0 mm, base height 12.0 mm, hub width 36.0 mm, hub height 60.0 mm, and left offset 42.0 mm. These target parameters, along with a tolerance of 0.5 mm and the expected output .slvs and .dxf file paths, are explicitly enforced by the verifier logic.
